name: rule-system
description: Session-scoped and project-shared rule capture, CRUD, and pick workflows for Codex projects.

interface.longDescription: Rule System packages session-rule CRUD, project-shared rule libraries, rule picking, display policy, and context capture without mixing rules into long-term memory.
defaultPrompt: Manage current-session rules without long-term memory.
Pick shared project rules into this session.
Capture explicit requirements as atomic rules.
